v0.1.27-alpha.description:
## SMO Archipelago v0.1.27-alpha

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.27-alpha/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v0.1.27-alpha.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.27-alpha/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* fix(display): use "to" instead of "->" in moon-send label by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/140
* fix(setup): reject msys2 cmake from PATH fallback by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/138
* rename: smo -> meatballs to free the worlds.smo / .apsmo slot by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/139
* PopTracker auto-update: add v0.1.26-alpha by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/137
* Gate shine-color override on al::isExistModel (Cascade reload crash fix) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/141
* feat(apworld,poptracker): add festival% goal option by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/142


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.1.26-alpha...v0.1.27-alpha
v0.1.27-alpha.title: v0.1.27-alpha

v0.1.28-alpha.description:
## SMO Archipelago v0.1.28-alpha

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.28-alpha/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v0.1.28-alpha.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.28-alpha/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* feat(switch-mod): gate M7 uncapture on isActiveHackStartDemo; tryEscape split by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/144
* feat(setup): auto-install missing prereqs from the wizard by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/146
* feat(_setup): harden wizard against hangs, retries, and partial outputs by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/145
* fix(switch-mod): route worker-thread Cappy enqueues through frame-thread ring by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/147
* fix(bridge): aggressive TCP keepalive on accepted Switch sockets by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/149
* UDP bridge discovery + multi-Switch selector by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/150
* Hakkun migration: exlaunch -> LibHakkun + OdysseyHeaders + sail by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/151
* Talkatoo% Phase 4 + Gap #1 (progression filter) + Phase 5 (sphere-safe ordering) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/148
* PopTracker auto-update: add v0.1.27-alpha by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/143
* hakkun(phase 6): cutover switch-mod-hk -> switch-mod, subsdk8 -> subsdk9 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/153
* fix(switch-mod): unbreak ApDiscovery cross-compile (3 layers) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/154
* wizard: migrate setup flow from devkitPro to LLVM 19 + WinLibs (Tasks #15 + #16) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/155


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.1.27-alpha...v0.1.28-alpha
v0.1.28-alpha.title: v0.1.28-alpha

sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256

## What's Changed
* docs+setup: scrub remaining stale devkitPro references by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/161

v0.1.35-alpha.description:
## SMO Archipelago v0.1.35-alpha

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.35-alpha/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v0.1.35-alpha.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.35-alpha/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* apworld logic: drop Peace gates from kingdom chain + audit painting moons by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/175
* wizard_cli: headless orchestrator + JSON-event CLI for the setup pipeline by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/173
* wizard: add sys.audit subprocess allowlist + trace log by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/174
* ci: release-only Windows install audit + PR-time PATH-strip build by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/176
* gui: fix SwitchesPopup compressed-text on first open by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/177
* apworld: per-kingdom moon-count Range options by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/178
* Restore al::isExistModel null-safe gate in ShineAppearanceHook (Cascade reload crash fix) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/181
* switch-mod: fix OutOfSessions connect regression on retail by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/180
* switch-mod: silence per-frame capture-retry log spam pre-scene-load by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/179
* ci: drop PR-time Windows PATH-strip build by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/182
* Skip extraction in wizard when canonical maps already hash correctly by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/185
* Restore M7 demo-end gate + tryEscapeHack split (Hakkun cutover regression) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/184
* ci: bump GitHub Actions to Node 24-compatible versions by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/183
* ci: raise clean-windows-audit timeout 30m -> 60m by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/186
* fix(talkatoo): drop '#' from BK Moon probe strings (font has no #) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/187
* ci: disable clean-windows-audit so tag pushes can publish by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/188
* fix(client): resolve cross-game item names in Channel A cutscene labels by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/189


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.1.32-alpha...v0.1.35-alpha
v0.1.35-alpha.title: v0.1.35-alpha

v0.1.36-alpha.description:
## SMO Archipelago v0.1.36-alpha

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.36-alpha/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v0.1.36-alpha.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.1.36-alpha/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* refactor(client): dial AP eagerly on Connect; remove Switch-presence gate by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/191
* feat(switch-mod): on-Switch ImGui debug overlay + subnet sweep + LibHakkun bump by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/198
* feat(switch-mod): UDP subnet sweep replaces broadcast for SMOClient discovery by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/197
* local pre-tag audit: tempdir-sandboxed harness + pre-push hook by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/190
* PopTracker auto-update: add v0.1.35-alpha by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/192
* Fix Talkatoo% pause-menu mark to track AP-pool picks, not vanilla picker by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/201
* Drop HAKKUN.md migration runbook (cutover complete) by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/200
* docs(claude.md): mark Talkatoo% Phase 5 + Gap #1 as shipped by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/193
* fix(switch-mod): drop stuck Cappy bubbles + demote per-frame tryShow logs by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/202
* docs: trim retired history from CLAUDE.md + skills, move dev venv to repo root by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/196
* fix(talkatoo): expand progression list from 22 to 38 scenario-advancing moons by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/199
* feat(switch-mod): collapse seed-pot wait via rs::getGrowFlowerTime hook by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/203
* Gitignore shine_table.h + wire sync_shine into build pipeline by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/205
* docs(smo-build): add switch-mod/lib/imgui to fresh-worktree submodule init by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/206
* feat(switch-mod): fix Lost Kingdom Odyssey-grounded softlock; demote Ruined moons to filler by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/207
* fix(switch-mod): repin LibHakkun to main HEAD, unblock clean Windows build by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/208
* fix(release-audit): honor SWITCH_MOD_ALLOWED_SOURCE_WRITES in e2e test by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/209


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.1.35-alpha...v0.1.36-alpha
v0.1.36-alpha.title: v0.1.36-alpha

v0.2.0-beta.description:
## SMO Archipelago v0.2.0-beta

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.2.0-beta/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v0.2.0-beta.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.2.0-beta/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* fix(switch-mod): disable TalkatooMenuMarkHook — it breaks Talkatoo speech by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/217
* PopTracker auto-update: add v0.1.39-alpha by @github-actions[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/218
* fix(ci): use PAT_FOR_RELEASES for poptracker PR workflow by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/219
* Filler-only Cascade scenario moons + PAT for poptracker PR CI by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/220
* fix(extract): point hactool fallback at post-e1bcdbd install location by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/221
* fix(display): use ASCII hyphen for moon-label truncation so it does not render as ? by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/222
* fix(client): reset per-slot bridge state on slot-change reconnect by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/223
* fix(extract): auto-trim trailing zero padding in oversized prod.keys entries by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/224
* fix(launcher): never fall through to sys.argv on .meatballsap click by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/225


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.1.39-alpha...v0.2.0-beta
v0.2.0-beta.title: v0.2.0-beta

* fix(wizard): force UTF-8 stdio so JP-locale (cp932) builds don't crash by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/228
* feat(client): hold save-load snapshots behind /confirm_snapshot until operator confirms by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/227


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.2.0-beta...v0.2.1-beta

## SMO Archipelago v0.2.2-beta

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.2.2-beta/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v0.2.2-beta.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v0.2.2-beta/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* PopTracker auto-update: add v0.2.1-beta by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/229
* Add sentinel-driven and force-driven map reload for mid-session wizard runs by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/230
* fix(client): surface held-snapshot prompt in the Archipelago tab by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/233
* fix(switch-mod): stop Talkatoo% from saying "No more hints now" by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/231
* ci: bump softprops/action-gh-release from 1 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/232


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v0.2.1-beta...v0.2.2-beta

## SMO Archipelago v1.3.0

### First-time users — start here

**📖 [docs/first-time-setup.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v1.3.0/docs/first-time-setup.md)** — full walkthrough: prerequisites, multiworld generation, and the SMOClient setup wizard.

### Optional: PopTracker pack

Download `smo-poptracker-v1.3.0.zip` below and
extract it into PopTracker's `packs/` directory.

**🔄 Changing AP server / slot / bridge PC after setup:**
[docs/changing-servers.md](https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/blob/v1.3.0/docs/changing-servers.md)

### Verifying the downloads

```
sha256sum -c meatballs.apworld.sha256
sha256sum -c smo-poptracker.sha256
```


## What's Changed
* PopTracker auto-update: add v1.2.0 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/260
* Fix Sand Kingdom logic: story-moon exclusion + no-op Jaxi gates by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/263
* Fix PopTracker capture/move gates broken with capturesanity ON by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/266
* ci: bump actions/setup-python from 6.2.0 to 6.3.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/265
* ci: bump actions/cache from 5.0.5 to 6.1.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/264
* ci: bump actions/checkout from 6.0.3 to 7.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/262
* ci: bump softprops/action-gh-release from 3.0.0 to 3.0.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/261
* Difficult Mode + logic fixes (rebased #267 + review fixes) by @LLD-Jo in https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/pull/268


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/smo_archipelago/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0
